args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) >= '2016-01-01' AND CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) >= '2016-01-01' AND CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT date FROM review LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT date FROM review LIMIT 20;

args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE CAST(COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M')) AS DATE) BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE CAST(COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M')) AS DATE) BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "The business with the highest average rating between January 1, 2016, and June 30, 2016 (considering only businesses with at least 5 reviews) is \"Coffee House Too Cafe\". It belongs to the categories: Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes."

args.answer: The business with the highest average rating between January 1, 2016, and June 30, 2016 (considering only businesses with at least 5 reviews) is "Coffee House Too Cafe". It belongs to the categories: Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes.
